I have my teeth______________by a dentist every six months.

(clean/cut/deliver/paint/repair/sign)

(clean/cut/deliver/paint/repair/sign)

(clean/cut/deliver/paint/repair/sign)

(clean/cut/deliver/paint/repair/sign)

Did you have your book_______________by the author? 

(clean/cut/deliver/paint/repair/sign)

Garry is going to have his face_______________blue for the party! 

(clean/cut/deliver/paint/repair/sign)
